name: native-openclaw
description: Multi-provider AI agent CLI — native TypeScript, zero framework lock-in.

scripts.pretest: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.test: node test/session-resume.test.js && node test/zai-provider.test.js && node test/validator.test.js && node test/workspace.test.js && node test/workspace-qa.test.js && node test/api-server.test.js && node test/api-ratelimit-boundary.test.js && node test/telegram.test.js && node test/network.test.js && node test/mcp.test.js && node test/gold-workflow.test.js && node test/slash-autocomplete.test.js && node test/reasoning-sanitizer.test.js && node test/tool-alias.test.js && node test/react-loop.test.js && node test/system-execute.test.js && node test/system-execute-security.test.js && node test/command-planner.test.js && node test/reasoning-engine.test.js && node test/prompt-optimizer.test.js && node test/brevo-email.test.js && node test/html-sanitizer.test.js && node test/orchestrator.test.js && node test/semantic-memory.test.js && node test/context-compressor.test.js && node test/browsing.test.js && node test/api-client.test.js && node test/system-time.test.js && node test/providers.test.js && node test/scheduler.test.js && node test/self-improving.test.js && node test/self-healing.test.js && node --import tsx --test test/orchestrator.test.ts test/tool-loop.test.ts test/router.test.ts
scripts.test:workspace: npm run build && node test/workspace.test.js && node test/workspace-qa.test.js
scripts.test:build: npm run build && npm run test:workspace
